sentences.arabic: يُعَرَّفُ التَّوَكُّلُ عَلَى اللَّهِ بِأَنَّهُ صِدْقُ اعْتِمَادِ الْقَلْبِ عَلَى الْخَالِقِ فِي اسْتِجْلَابِ الْمَصَالِحِ وَدَفْعِ الْمَضَارِّ مَعَ الْأَخْذِ بِالْأَسْبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Tevakkul (pouzdanje u Allaha) definiše se kao iskreno oslanjanje srca na Stvoritelja u ostvarivanju koristi i otklanjanju štete, uz poduzimanje potrebnih uzroka.
sentences.translationEn: Tawakkul (reliance on Allah) is defined as the heart's sincere reliance on the Creator to bring about benefits and ward off harms, while taking the necessary means.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ ضَرَبَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَرْوَعَ الْأَمْثِلَةِ فِي التَّوَكُّلِ خِلَالَ هِجْرَتِهِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, dao je najljepše primjere pouzdanja tokom svoje hidžre u Medinu.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) set the most wonderful examples of reliance during his migration to Medina.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا كَانَ فِي الْغَارِ مَعَ أَبِي بَكْرِ الصِّدِّيقِ، قَالَ لَهُ بِيَقِينٍ تَامٍّ: «مَا ظَنُّكَ يَا أَبَا بَكْرٍ بِاثْنَيْنِ اللَّهُ ثَالِثُهُمَا؟» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ فَضَائِلِ أَصْحَابِ النَّبِيِّ].
sentences.translation: Kada je bio u pećini sa Ebu Bekrom es-Siddikom, rekao mu je sa potpunim uvjerenjem: 'Šta misliš, o Ebu Bekre, o dvojici s kojima je Allah treći?' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o vrlinama Poslanikovih ashaba].
sentences.translationEn: When he was in the cave with Abu Bakr al-Siddiq, he said to him with complete certainty: 'What do you think, O Abu Bakr, of two with whom Allah is the third?' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Virtues of the Companions of the Prophet].

sentences.arabic: يُوَضِّحُ الْعُلَمَاءُ أَنَّ التَّرْكَ لِلْأَسْبَابِ نَقْصٌ فِي الْعَقْلِ، بَيْنَمَا الِاعْتِمَادُ الْكُلِّيُّ عَلَيْهَا نَقْصٌ فِي التَّوْحِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Učenjaci pojašnjavaju da je zanemarivanje uzroka manjkavost u razumu, dok je potpuno oslanjanje na same uzroke manjkavost u tevhid u.
sentences.translationEn: Scholars explain that abandoning the means is a deficiency in intellect, while total reliance on the means alone is a deficiency in Tawhid.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُؤْمِنُ الْحَقُّ هُوَ مَنْ يَبْذُلُ جُهْدَهُ ثُمَّ يُفَوِّضُ أَمْرَهُ لِلَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Pravi vjernik je onaj koji uloži svoj trud, a zatim prepusti svoju stvar Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: A true believer is one who exerts his effort and then entrusts his affair to Allah.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّوَازُنُ الدَّقِيقُ هُوَ مَا يَجْلِبُ السَّكِينَةَ لِلنَّفْسِ فِي مَوَاقِفِ الشِّدَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova precizna ravnoteža je ono što donosi smiraj duši u teškim situacijama.
sentences.translationEn: This delicate balance is what brings tranquility to the soul in situations of hardship.
